caption.text:
Every team wants to beat the odds. One team is the odds. The reign of @TeamUSA Men's Basketball continues at the @olympics.

#Paris2024

No regrets.

kingjames isn’t the type to get over a loss. Even if it happened twenty years ago.

 Paris2024 @olympics

fragments.plaintext:
Look on the bright side.

You’ve had the privilege of losing to the champion
Kimiya Alizadeh knows the true meaning of loss. Yet every time she steps onto the mat, she carries with her an insatiable desire to win.

caption.text:
Kimiya Alizadeh knows the true meaning of loss. Yet every time she steps onto the mat, she carries with her an insatiable desire to win.

@olympics Paris2024

fragments.plaintext:

But against @wemby, you’ll be lucky if you get to take any at all.
Paris2024
